API docs by Redocly

Multica API (cd0281e4f)

Download OpenAPI specification:

REST API of the Multica task-management platform, as implemented by the Go backend (server/). Derived by hand from the Chi router and the official TypeScript client; not published or guaranteed stable by upstream.

public

Liveness check

Responses

Local dev server (make server)

http://localhost:8080/health

Readiness check

Responses

Local dev server (make server)

http://localhost:8080/readyz

Readiness check (alias of /readyz)

Responses

Local dev server (make server)

http://localhost:8080/healthz

Realtime subsystem metrics (loopback or REALTIME_METRICS_TOKEN bearer)

Responses

Local dev server (make server)

http://localhost:8080/health/realtime

Workspace realtime WebSocket (event push — issue/comment/task updates)

Upgrade to WebSocket. Auth via session cookie or PAT. See packages/core/api/ws-client.ts for the event contract. Useful for a tracking system that wants push instead of polling.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Local dev server (make server)

http://localhost:8080/ws

Public app configuration

Responses

Local dev server (make server)

http://localhost:8080/api/config

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "cdn_domain": "string",
  • "cdn_signed": true,
  • "allow_signup": true,
  • "google_client_id": "string",
  • "posthog_key": "string",
  • "posthog_host": "string",
  • "analytics_environment": "string",
  • "daemon_server_url": "string",
  • "daemon_app_url": "string",
  • "workspace_creation_disabled": true
}

issues

Assignment frequency per assignee (member or agent)

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
X-Workspace-ID
required
string <uuid>

Workspace selector. X-Workspace-Slug is accepted as an alternative.

Responses

Local dev server (make server)

http://localhost:8080/api/assignee-frequency

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "assignee_type": "string",
    • "assignee_id": "string",
    • "frequency": 0
    }
]

List issues

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
project_id
string
status
string
assignee_id
string
assignee_types
string

Comma-separated assignee types, e.g. member,agent

limit
integer
offset
integer
header Parameters
X-Workspace-ID
required
string <uuid>

Workspace selector. X-Workspace-Slug is accepted as an alternative.

Responses

Local dev server (make server)

http://localhost:8080/api/issues

Issue timeline — merged activity-log entries + comments, oldest first. PRIMARY source for who-did-what-when.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string
header Parameters
X-Workspace-ID
required
string <uuid>

Workspace selector. X-Workspace-Slug is accepted as an alternative.

Responses

Local dev server (make server)

http://localhost:8080/api/issues/{id}/timeline

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "type": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "actor_type": "string",
    • "actor_id": "string",
